ksa_text: Develop and maintain data and AI program plans, including scope definition, data governance frameworks, standards and policies, workforce requirements assessment, and resource allocation strategies.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of program protection planning to include information technology (IT) supply chain security/risk management policies, anti-tampering techniques, and requirements.

ddat.top_element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology

eu_ai_act.top_element_label: Obligations of deployers of high-risk AI systems

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA OP-T-001 (Operational Excellence) scores 0.439 composite (signal: weak). Scope fit for Data Architect: out_of_scope. Preliminary decision: exclude.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Out-of-scope exclusion is internally consistent. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Operational Excellence KSA OP-T-001 as a discrete competency for Data Architect?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA excluded at Pass 2 (scope: out_of_scope) or Pass 3. No market evidence warrants reversal for Data Architect.

decision_rationale: Operational Excellence is out of scope for Data Architect.
